properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 83/23
 1. FROM 290100 UTC JUN 23. MV RAMFORM HYPERION CS LARU8 IS MOVING FROM TROMSOEFLAKET, BARENTS SEA TO VORIINGPLATAAET, NORWEGIAN SEA. APPROXIMATE ROUTE WITH THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES :

 A. 71-22.0N  019-10.0E
 B. 69-20.0N  011-00.0E
 C. 67-23.0N  004-37.0E

 TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES WITH A MAXIMUM LENGHT OF 6NM, TOTAL WIDHT 1NM. 
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED 3NM ABEAM , 3NM BOTH SIDES AND 7NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSEL MV THOR OMEGA AND MV AAS PROVIDER IN ATTENDANCE.
 VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 72 AND 16.

 2.CANCEL NAVARE XIX 82/23
